#  BlueQubit Quantum Advantage Challenge
A fully funded wallet with 0.25 BTC will remain [publicly visible at the challenge wallet address](https://www.blockchain.com/explorer/addresses/btc/bc1qcga5wx9e7gvz2eml0gpkrlpmttjzyw6rc6xfzz)  
The 256-bit private key of that wallet is hidden across 5 problems of increasing difficulty.  
Each problem corresponds to solving one peaked circuit.  
Solve all five → assemble the key → the Bitcoin Wallet is yours. 🎉
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67a5335fdc1bd34e50f7217a_mark-bq-outline.svg)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67a532849c064880f1387835_comps_light_hero.png)[Go to the Challenge ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/639acb0f16d4d943650fe023_Arrow-Right.svg)](https://app.bluequbit.io/hackathons/GFgHTGbTylwmMsCp)
### 1/4 BTC in Prizes
The Challenge winner will take home the 0.25 BTC prize!
01
Peaked Circuits
Join our one-of-a-kind quantum challenge, where you’ll put your quantum computing skills to test and solve Peaked Circuit challenges.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdcac8b54af5436fdaaa6b_img-hs-card1.jpg)
02
The Challenge
Participants will have the chance to compete and collaborate on puzzles never seen before using their quantum algorithmic skills.  

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdcac8bb8ec5925b4f568d_img-hs-card2.jpg)
03
Who can join
The hackathon is open to all experience levels — anyone from quantum enthusiasts to seasoned researchers is welcome.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdcac9bca33400263d758a_img-hs-card3.jpg)
##  Peaked Circuits Challenge
Participants of the BlueQubit quantum hackathon will receive special quantum circuits (Peaked Circuits) where each circuit sets up a specific quantum state.
Hidden within that state is a single bitstring that appears with high probability. Your mission is to find this bitstring!
##  BlueQubit  
Hackathon Partners 
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cde5b6b79a58c7bdbd813f_img-light-aboutbq.webp)

###  Peaked Circuits in a Nutshell
“Peaked circuits” are pre-constructed quantum circuits with a non-uniform distribution of measurement outcomes.
What are Peaked circuits
They are designed in a way that one particular bitstring has a higher probability than others, e.g. O(1) as opposed to exponentially small amplitude. Your challenge is to identify that ‘peak bitstring’ in the distribution.
Who created them
They were [introduced by Scott Aaronson](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.14493) as a way to achieve verifiable quantum advantage. Carefully crafted peaked circuits look like random circuits - like the one used by [Google in their benchmark](https://blog.google/technology/research/google-willow-quantum-chip/) that would take supercomputers septillion=10²⁵ years to replicate. However, unlike random circuits - peaked circuits are much easier to verify: all you need to do is to run them on a quantum computer and verify you get the correct hidden bitstring!
BlueQubit Quantum Hackathon
This quantum hackathon aims to test the skills of quantum researchers and enthusiasts in how well they can use quantum computers and simulators to crack peaked circuits.
##  About BlueQubit 
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cde5b6b79a58c7bdbd813f_img-light-aboutbq.webp)
BlueQubit is a quantum computing company dedicated to democratizing access to quantum technology. Our platform features simulators that let you refine circuits before moving them to real quantum computers. One of our research areas involves peaked circuits—and how they allow you to encrypt a message so that only quantum computers can decrypt it. Through the BlueQubit quantum hackathon, we aim to inspire more students and quantum enthusiasts to explore circuits that can run on real quantum computers.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67a5581c7483717a428f72de_BQ-logomark-outline.svg)
## FAQs
### **What is quantum computing software used for?**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdeb9fb77d31d5d2b2f2ef_icon-plus.svg)
Quantum computing software is designed to help users create, simulate, and run quantum algorithms on quantum or hybrid systems. It can be especially useful in fields like cryptography, materials science, and machine learning. The technology comes with the tools and interface needed to translate classical problems into quantum logic.
### **Which quantum computing platform is best for beginners?**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdeb9fb77d31d5d2b2f2ef_icon-plus.svg)
The right [quantum computing platform](https://www.bluequbit.io/platform) for beginners should offer an intuitive interface, learning resources, and quick access to quantum simulators or real hardware. BlueQubit is designed to be accessible, helping new users explore quantum technology without feeling overwhelmed. This makes it easy to start building and testing quantum circuits right away.
### **Can I use quantum computing software without owning a quantum computer?**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdeb9fb77d31d5d2b2f2ef_icon-plus.svg)
Yes, most quantum computing platforms, like BlueQubit, provide simulators and cloud access to quantum hardware, so you don’t need to own a quantum computer. These tools let you build and test quantum circuits on classical systems before running them on actual quantum machines. This way, researchers, students, and developers can use quantum technology without specialized hardware.  

### **Is there any free cloud-based quantum computing software available?**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdeb9fb77d31d5d2b2f2ef_icon-plus.svg)
Yes, several platforms offer free access to cloud-based quantum computing software. BlueQubit, for example, has a free plan that allows users to run simulations, experiment with quantum circuits, and get access to actual quantum backends. It's a great way to start learning and building without financial barriers.
###  **How do quantum cloud computing platforms compare?**  

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdeb9fb77d31d5d2b2f2ef_icon-plus.svg)
Quantum cloud platforms differ in areas like hardware support, development tools, user experience, and pricing. While some may focus on open-source frameworks and community learning, for example, others prioritize enterprise-grade solutions or hybrid quantum-classical workflows. BlueQubit offers a balance of usability and power, with flexible plans and real-time quantum access tailored for a range of users.

FAQs

What is quantum computing software used for?

It can be especially useful in fields like cryptography, materials science, and machine learning. The technology comes with the tools and interface needed to translate classical problems into quantum logic.

BlueQubit is designed to be accessible, helping new users explore quantum technology without feeling overwhelmed. This makes it easy to start building and testing quantum circuits right away.

Can I use quantum computing software without owning a quantum computer?

These tools let you build and test quantum circuits on classical systems before running them on actual quantum machines. This way, researchers, students, and developers can use quantum technology without specialized hardware.
